mapper.select: SELECT count(estate_id) cnt FROM estate WHERE ${findtype} LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findkey}, '%')

SELECT estate_id, agent_num, estate_title, estate_addr, estate_deposit, estate_rent, estate_viewCount, estate_state FROM estate WHERE ${findtype} LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findkey}, '%') ORDER BY estate_id DESC LIMIT #{strnum}, #{pageSize}
